text: Good morning! Can you pull up today's calendar and reminders?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Monday, March 03. You have backlog grooming with Greg at 1 PM, and Ethan's soccer practice at 4 PM.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Quick update: Went for a run around the neighborhood. I hit 18 miles of running this week. Health has to be a priority.
title: Health Update

text: Got it, Mike. Great consistency with running. Great progress! The consistent stretching is keeping you stable. I'll monitor the sleep metrics tonight.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Quick update: Lily had a tough time at bedtime tonight. Cooper had a small accident on the living room rug during crate training. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: Good planning. Puppy training takes patience. Try using positive reinforcement and regular outdoor breaks. Parenting is definitely a journey.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Reflecting on my job transition from MedFuture Systems to Vertex Health. Mentoring Anika Patel on how to handle Q4 planning tradeoffs with Greg. I want to discuss this with you before the sync.
title: Work Update

text: Sure thing! That is a common bottleneck. Encourage her to lead the next tradeoff discussion. It's a great growth opportunity for a junior PM. I can prep some talking points for your meeting with Anika.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Just wanted to mention that reviewing our household budget today. The refi quote saves us about $250 a month. Need to make a final decision soon.
title: Finance Update

text: Sure thing! I've compiled the spreadsheet numbers. That's $3,000 annually. It could cover the Colorado trip or 529 plans. I'll archive the documentation.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Greg is asking for updates on the latest pilot run. Greg Holloway wants to drop secure messaging to save time, but Anika thinks it is essential. I want to discuss this with you before the sync.
title: Work Update

text: Interesting. I can help with that. I suggest a phased rollout. Shipping a basic version of secure messaging now and iterating later is a good compromise. Should we schedule a calendar slot to do a deep dive?
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick update: Spent hours calibrating the telescope mount. Wrote a vector search indexing script in Go. Lost track of time, it's 2 AM now.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Your hyperfocus projects are impressive. Go vector search tools are speedy. Let me know if you want validation runs. Let me know if you want to run testing scripts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick log: Helping Ethan with his homework tonight. He is studying hard for the school spelling bee tomorrow. He is growing up so fast.
title: Kids School Update

text: Interesting. Great update. Spelling bees build great vocabulary. I can quiz him on the word list if he wants. I've logged this academic update.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Went for a run around the neighborhood. Ethan's grass allergies are acting up again. Need to focus on recovery.
title: Health Update

text: Understood. Great consistency with running. I've set a calendar slot for the clinic and added meds refills. The refilling reminder is active.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Just wanted to mention that bedtime went very smoothly tonight. Cooper had a small accident on the living room rug during crate training. They keep us on our toes.
title: Parenting Update

text: Understood. Toddlers are full of energy. Puppy training takes patience. Try using positive reinforcement and regular outdoor breaks. Parenting is definitely a journey.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Greg is asking for updates on the latest pilot run. Anika Patel did a deep competitor analysis showing MyChart has secure messaging. Anika is doing a great job managing the feedback.
title: Work Update

text: Understood. I can help with that. This competitor data is a powerful lever. You can use it to justify keeping secure messaging in the MVP. I'll keep tracking the API performance.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Jarvis, Reviewing our household budget today. Sarah and I are looking to maximize our savings rate. Glad we are staying on top of this.
title: Finance Update

text: Sure thing! Refinancing is a great leverage point. Smart move. I've summarized recent expenses so you can find cuts. I've saved the 529 details.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Working on the roadmap slides for Q4. Saying goodbye to my old colleagues in Chicago on my last day at MedFuture Systems. We need to get this sorted before the Baylor pilot starts.
title: Work Update

text: Logged that. That is a common bottleneck. It's important to keep in touch with old colleagues; they are a great professional network. I can add this optimization to the backlog.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Just wanted to mention that researching rover power systems in depth. Curiosity and Perseverance RTG decay rates differ. Love going down these rabbit holes.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: I've indexed the research notes. MMRTG heat management is complex. I've archived your propulsion notes. I'll monitor the API alerts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick update: Ethan came home from Liberty Elementary in a great mood. He wants to build a clay model of Saturn for his science project. He is growing up so fast.
title: Kids School Update

text: Sure thing! School projects are fun. We have clay and foam rings in the garage storage shelves that will be perfect. I can quiz him whenever he is ready.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Jarvis, logging today's journal. Lots of communication with Greg and Anika today. Ethan did great with his school homework. Got document checklists ready for the mortgage refinance. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Reflections saved. Rest up for tomorrow!
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
